title: OUR HOUSE RESIDENTIAL CARE - 211info
text: OUR HOUSE OUR HOUSE RESIDENTIAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a residential care facility for people living with HIV with a capacity of 14 individuals. Residents receive nursing, occupational therapy, and social work support. Some residents regain their health and become independent enough to be discharged. Others remain for continued intensive services, maintenance services, or palliative care. 2727 SE Alder Street Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: -Individuals with an HIV diagnosis -No evidence of communicable Tuberculosis -Eligible for Medicaid or have private insurance that covers needed services -A way to pay for room and board -Meet income restrictions of 185% of federal poverty level guidelines -A need for 24-hour nursing care, shown by any of the following: -Repeated hospitalizations or ER visits within the past 3 months -Inability to manage complex medication regime -Change of condition resulting in new or deteriorating activities of daily living (ADL) deficits -Complex care plan due to unstable conditions or symptoms -Uncontrolled pain or other symptoms such as fatigue or nausea -Unexplained weight loss or gain -Severe dementia or behavioral issues that contribute to decreased management of any of the above issues Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 234-0175 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 234-0175 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Resident selection is through a waitlist. FEES: Varies DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 15. Stop at SE 26th and Belmont Street is 3 blocks away. Services: Homeless Permanent Supportive Housing * AIDS/HIV Nursing Facilities * AIDS/HIV Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - NEIGHBORHOOD HOUSING AND CARE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OUR HOUSE
